summary:
Feature: DEEP AUDIT: hx-theme — Enterprise Component Quality Review

## Deep Audit V2: hx-theme

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-theme` component (theme provider/wrapper).

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — Token cascade correctness. Light/dark mode switching. Custom theme support.
2. **Accessibility** — Color contrast in all themes. Prefers-reduced-motion. Prefers-color-scheme.
3. **Functionality** — Theme application, nesting, dynamic switching, CSS custom
